title: Broil-Gruyère Healer
description: A savory Russian dish featuring flaky Gruyère cheese with a dash-friendly touch to soothe hangovers.
instructions: In a mixing bowl, combine grated Gruyère cheese, heavy cream, butter, minced garlic, salt, black pepper, and paprika.
Mix well until cheese is fully incorporated and mixture is smooth.
Transfer the mixture into a shallow baking dish. Spread evenly to form a crust on top.
Sprinkle with fresh parsley sprigs if desired for garnish.
Bake in preheated oven for 20 minutes or until golden brown and bubbly around edges.
Remove from oven and let cool slightly before serving.
Serve hot as a snack or light meal.
